beta_experience_master_flow.summary: Complete BETA user journey documentation covering PA establishment, 15-turn A/B testing (60/40 TELOS/native), Observatory access, fidelity visualizations, and TELOS unlock
key_concepts: Phase 2A: Turns 1-5 single-blind (3 TELOS, 2 native randomized)
Observatory unlocks at Turn 10 and Turn 15
beta_experience_master_flow.recall_trigger: When discussing BETA user experience, A/B testing, or PA establishment

beta_status_summary.summary: Integration status showing DEMO mode untouched, BETA fully integrated, all components present, and business development docs ready
key_facts: DEMO mode: fully operational, original #FFD700 gold preserved
BETA tab unlock: fixed with slide-based completion check
12 BETA component files present and integrated
Business docs: NVIDIA Inception, NCP-AAI, Partnership Strategy ready
beta_status_summary.recall_trigger: When checking status, debugging integration, or reviewing component availability

market_position.summary: TELOS is the governance infrastructure layer for the entire agentic AI industry - not just a research project
key_insights: Category creation: AI Governance Infrastructure (like Stripe for payments)
Moat: Mathematical framework (Primacy State + Lyapunov stability)
market_position.recall_trigger: When discussing business strategy, market opportunity, or partnerships

regulatory_forcing_function.summary: SB 53 (Jan 1, 2026) and EU AI Act make AI governance mandatory - enterprises MUST have continuous monitoring + intervention
key_deadlines: SB 53 effective: January 1, 2026 (43 days from Nov 18)
EU AI Act Article 72 templates: February 2026
penalty_context: EU AI Act: up to €35M or 7% global revenue
Enterprises will pay $420K/year for compliance vs face massive fines
regulatory_forcing_function.recall_trigger: When discussing compliance, regulatory pressure, enterprise urgency, or LangChain partnership timing

pa_onboarding.styling: Yellow border (#FFD700, 3px), 32px header, 22px questions, 20px input, no emoji

fidelity_visualization.purpose: Bar graphs showing PS score over time, drift detection

observatory_review.purpose: Full metrics analysis and Steward explanations

main_integration.purpose: BETA mode rendering and PA check before conversation

recent_changes.details: Removed emoji, added yellow border, increased fonts, changed placeholder to 'Tell TELOS what you want to accomplish...'
Added pa_onboarding to render_tabs_and_content() function parameters
Context recall mechanisms for Claude Code session restarts

on_session_start: Read BETA_EXPERIENCE_MASTER_FLOW.md for complete BETA flow
Read BETA_STATUS_SUMMARY.md for current integration status
Reference business/ docs for market context
Use Steward_PM.py to programmatically access critical docs
Run ./Telos_recall.sh to display all critical context
on_beta_questions: Check beta_sequence_generator.py for A/B testing logic
Verify main.py lines 1034-1100+ for integration points

styling.fonts: Large and readable (20px minimum for user input)

documentation.format: Markdown with tables, clear headings, file references

development.placeholder_text: Generic, not TELOS-specific for native LLM context
